category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device compliance comparison for Venezuela market entry (CONATEL / SENCAMER).

title.en: China-to-Venezuela Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (CONATEL / SENCAMER)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入委内瑞拉：合规差距矩阵（CONATEL / SENCAMER）
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入委內瑞拉：合規差距矩陣（CONATEL / SENCAMER）

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Venezuelan CONATEL mandatory homologación (radio and telecom terminal equipment type approval under Ley Orgánica de Telecomunicaciones 2000 as amended), SENCAMER COVENIN standards (adopting IEC/ISO) for EMC and electrical safety, RIF importer registration, Spanish labelling requirements, and CONATEL cybersecurity oversight. Venezuela operates at 120 V / 60 Hz with Type A/B plugs (US-compatible hardware is advantageous). FCC, CE, and CCC approvals are not recognised by CONATEL; a separate Venezuelan homologación certificate is required. Practical import considerations around forex controls and currency restrictions under current economic conditions are noted as a significant operational gap.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与委内瑞拉CONATEL强制型式认证（依据《2000年电信组织法》（已修订）的无线电及电信终端设备型号认证）、SENCAMER COVENIN标准（采用IEC/ISO）在EMC和电气安全方面的要求、RIF进口商登记、西班牙语标注要求，以及CONATEL网络安全监管的差距对照。委内瑞拉采用120V/60Hz、A/B型插头（US兼容硬件具有优势）。FCC、CE和CCC核准不被CONATEL承认；需要单独的委内瑞拉型式认证证书。外汇管制和货币限制等经济条件下的实际进口注意事项被列为重大运营差距。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與委內瑞拉CONATEL強制型式認證（依據《2000年電信組織法》（已修訂）的無線電及電信終端設備型號認證）、SENCAMER COVENIN標準（採用IEC/ISO）在EMC和電氣安全方面的要求、RIF進口商登記、西班牙語標注要求，以及CONATEL網路安全監管的差距對照。委內瑞拉採用120V/60Hz、A/B型插頭（US相容硬件具有優勢）。FCC、CE和CCC核准不被CONATEL承認；需要單獨的委內瑞拉型式認證證書。外匯管制和貨幣限制等經濟條件下的實際進口注意事項被列為重大運營差距。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, CONATEL homologación, SENCAMER certification, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current CONATEL resolutions, SENCAMER COVENIN standards, RIF requirements, Venezuelan import and labelling requirements, and applicable forex and customs regulations with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or sale in Venezuela. Economic and regulatory conditions in Venezuela are subject to significant change; independent verification of all requirements is strongly recommended.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、CONATEL型式认证、SENCAMER认证、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在向委内瑞拉发货或销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行CONATEL决议、SENCAMER COVENIN标准、RIF要求、委内瑞拉进口及标注要求，以及适用的外汇和海关法规。委内瑞拉的经济和监管条件变动显著，强烈建议对所有要求进行独立核验。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、CONATEL型式認證、SENCAMER認證、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在向委內瑞拉發貨或銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行CONATEL決議、SENCAMER COVENIN標準、RIF要求、委內瑞拉進口及標注要求，以及適用的外匯和海關法規。委內瑞拉的經濟和監管條件變動顯著，強烈建議對所有要求進行獨立核驗。

answer_first.en: The main Venezuela compliance gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are: CONATEL mandatory homologación — all radio and telecom terminal equipment must obtain a CONATEL homologation certificate before import or sale, with no recognition of FCC, CE, SRRC, or CCC approvals; SENCAMER COVENIN EMC and electrical safety standards (IEC/ISO-adopting); RIF (Registro de Información Fiscal) importer registration; Spanish labelling displaying the CONATEL approval reference; and CONATEL cybersecurity oversight (no mandatory device-level certificate, but advisory scope applies). Venezuela uses 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B, making US-spec hardware electrically compatible — but CONATEL homologación is still separately required. Practical note: hyperinflation, USD forex controls, and disrupted formal import channels represent significant operational risks that should be assessed independently.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入委内瑞拉的主要合规差距为：CONATEL强制型式认证——所有无线电及电信终端设备在进口或销售前须取得CONATEL型式认证证书，不认可FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准；SENCAMER COVENIN EMC和电气安全标准（采用IEC/ISO）；RIF（财政信息登记册）进口商登记；标注CONATEL认证参考编号的西班牙语标签；以及CONATEL网络安全监管（无强制设备级认证，但顾问范围适用）。委内瑞拉采用120V/60Hz/A/B型插头，美规硬件具备电气兼容性——但CONATEL型式认证仍需单独申请。实际注意：恶性通货膨胀、美元外汇管制和正式进口渠道中断是需要独立评估的重大运营风险。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入委內瑞拉的主要合規差距為：CONATEL強制型式認證——所有無線電及電信終端設備在進口或銷售前須取得CONATEL型式認證證書，不認可FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准；SENCAMER COVENIN EMC和電氣安全標準（採用IEC/ISO）；RIF（財政資訊登記冊）進口商登記；標注CONATEL認證參考編號的西班牙語標籤；以及CONATEL網路安全監管（無強制裝置級認證，但顧問範圍適用）。委內瑞拉採用120V/60Hz/A/B型插頭，美規硬件具備電氣相容性——但CONATEL型式認證仍需單獨申請。實際注意：惡性通貨膨脹、美元外匯管制和正式進口渠道中斷是需要獨立評估的重大運營風險。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
